commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=1b8552c488a01e6bd3c037e53369713030753881)
commands.review_summary:
The PR removes the hard-coded macOS LaunchAgent `StandardErrorPath` of `/dev/null` and passes the resolved `gateway.err.log` path into both fresh install and restart-rewrite plist generation.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +4. Total +7 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the reported plist value: current `main` writes `/dev/null` as `StandardErrorPath` in both launchd plist generation paths, and current tests assert the restart rewrite output contains `/dev/null`. I did not run a live macOS `launchctl` repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This needs contributor proof plus maintainer review of the shipped logging-contract reversal and sibling diagnostics; missing real behavior proof means it should not be sent to an automated repair lane yet.

target.title: fix(mac-gateway): route launchd plist stderr to log file instead of /dev/null (#90711)
target.body:
## Summary
- bug: post-5.28 generated `~/Library/LaunchAgents/ai.openclaw.gateway.plist` hardcoded `StandardErrorPath` to `/dev/null`, silently discarding all gateway stderr (prompt-cache diagnostics, model fallback warnings, liveness warnings)
- fix: drop the `LAUNCH_AGENT_STDERR_PATH = "/dev/null"` constant and route stderr to the same supervisor log dir `stderrPath` (`~/Library/Logs/openclaw/gateway.err.log`) that `resolveMacLaunchAgentLogPaths` already computes; applied to both `writeLaunchAgentPlist` (install) and `rewriteLaunchAgentPlistForRestart` (restart rewrite)

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: launchd plist generation now writes a real `StandardErrorPath` instead of `/dev/null`; stderr is captured alongside stdout under `~/Library/Logs/openclaw/`
Real environment tested: local pnpm vitest in worktree
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/daemon/launchd.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: existing "rewrites the plist before bootstrap during restart fallback" test (`src/daemon/launchd.test.ts`) now asserts `<key>StandardErrorPath</key>` is followed by `<string>/Users/test/Library/Logs/openclaw/gateway.err.log</string>` and explicitly forbids `<key>StandardErrorPath</key>\s*<string>/dev/null</string>` via regex; vitest run passes
Observed result after fix: generated plist routes stderr to `gateway.err.log`; `StandardInPath` correctly remains `/dev/null` (`LAUNCH_AGENT_STDIN_PATH`)
What was not tested: live `launchctl bootstrap`/`launchctl print` reload against a real `~/Library/LaunchAgents/ai.openclaw.gateway.plist` (would need Crabbox/Testbox)

Fixes #90711
target.author: lonexreb
